{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The City of Chula Vista is preparing to break ground on an $89 million Cinematic Arts Academic Center & Library project.",
    "The Cinematic Arts Academic Center will house San Diego State University’s new Television, Film and New Media Studios.",
    "The facility will include new soundstages and a digital screening theater to support cinematic innovation and excellence.",
    "The new Cinematic Arts Academic Center & Library aims to provide higher education access in a region currently lacking a prominent four-year research institution.",
    "SDSU's new facility will feature a 50,000-square-foot film and television teaching center equipped with the latest technology.",
    "The Cinematic Arts Academic Center is designed to facilitate independent filmmaking education.",
    "The project aims to create a pathway to higher education for students in the local community.",
    "The facility will provide students with opportunities to graduate with an accomplished film portfolio.",
    "San Diego County is historically considered one of the top three filming regions in California but has lacked adequate production facilities."
  ]
